title: Fairy Professional Original Washing Up Liquid – Concentrated Dishwashing Liquid for Pots, Pans & Cutlery – 5 L Bottle – Powerful Grease Removal & Long-Lasting Suds
features: Powerful Grease-Cutting Performance: Specially formulated to lift grease, oil, and food residues from plates, pots, pans, cutlery and kitchenware — even stubborn, baked-on grease.
Concentrated & Long-Lasting: A 5 L bottle provides a high-volume supply for frequent dishwashing; a little goes a long way, making it economical for homes or professional kitchens.
Effective Even in Cold Water: Works efficiently even at lower temperatures — useful when hot water is not available or economical.
Suitable for All Kitchenware: Safe to use on dishes, glassware, utensils, pots and pans — ideal for everyday household cleaning or heavy-duty kitchen use.
description: Product Description Fairy Professional Original Washing Up Liquid 5 L is a concentrated, high-performance dishwashing solution designed to tackle everyday kitchen grease and food residue with ease. Whether you’re washing plates, pans, pots, or cutlery, just a small amount delivers powerful grease-cutting action — making even stubborn, stuck-on food dissolve quickly. The large 5 L bottle ensures you have a long-lasting supply, which is especially useful for frequent cooking or large households. Even in cold water, it remains effective, saving energy and time. Recommended for both domestic kitchens and professional settings, this bulk detergent offers reliable cleaning, high efficiency and excellent value. Ingredients Anionic surfactants (15–30%), Non-ionic surfactants (5–15%), Preservatives (e.g. Benzisothiazolinone, Phenoxyethanol), Perfumes/fragrance additives, Other formulation agents (to provide cleaning, suds stability, degreasing, etc.)
